Name: MimecastEvents-CCF
Author: Mimecast - support@mimecast.com
Description:
The Mimecast Events (Push) solution ingests Mimecast security event data directly into Microsoft Sentinel using the Codeless Connector Framework (CCF) Push pattern and the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

All Mimecast event types are unified in the `MimecastEvents_CL` table — Secure Email Gateway (Cloud Gateway, DLP), Targeted Threat Protection (URL Protect, Attachment Protect, Impersonation Protect), Audit, Cloud Integrated, and Awareness Training. The `mimecastEventType` column identifies the event type, preserving the data contract of the legacy Function App-based connectors so existing KQL queries require only a simple filter change.

No Mimecast API credentials are stored in Microsoft Sentinel. Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials (Entra app) configured on the Mimecast side.
